calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2002 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2002 Continued To Nov-20-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Pltf's in pro per is sanctioned 250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 11/20/2002 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2002 Continued To Oct-09-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, either side. Osc and sanctions in the amount of $250.00 to plaintiff in pro per, Terry Haggerty for failure to appear at the order to show cause hearing on 8/14/02 at 1:30 p.m. Sanctions payable on or before 8/29/02 to the court. . Osc continued to 10/9/02 at 1:30 p.m. to file proof of service, obtain answer from, or enter default. Osc to plaintiff in pro per. Jean Tualla, Clerk. Mary Hinds, CSR. #212.
